title: Write Your First Kubernetes Manifest
description: Write a Kubernetes Namespace manifest with proper metadata, labels, and annotations following Kubernetes 1.35 conventions.
starterCode:
# Write a Kubernetes Namespace manifest that:
# 1. Has apiVersion: v1 and kind: Namespace
# 2. Has metadata.name: 'production'
# 3. Has a label: environment: production
# 4. Has a label: team: platform
# 5. Has annotation: description: 'Production environment namespace'
solutionCode:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production
    team: platform
  annotations:
    description: 'Production environment namespace'
hints: apiVersion for core resources (Namespace, Pod, Service) is 'v1'
Labels go under metadata.labels as key-value pairs
Namespace names must be lowercase alphanumeric or hyphens

validationRules.errorMessage: Set apiVersion: v1 for core Kubernetes resources

simulatedOutput.success:
namespace/production created

NAME         STATUS   AGE
production   Active   0s

Labels:
  environment=production
  team=platform

Annotations:
  description: Production environment namespace
simulatedOutput.failure: Error from server: Namespace manifest validation failed. Check apiVersion, kind, name, and metadata structure.
